attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
A.DD_FINANCE_REPORT_LINE_ITEM_CD,
NODE_LEVEL01_ITEM_CD,
NODE_LEVEL01_ITEM_DESCR,
NODE_LEVEL01_SEQ_NUM_INT,
NODE_LEVEL02_ITEM_CD,
NODE_LEVEL02_ITEM_DESCR,
NODE_LEVEL02_SEQ_NUM_INT,
NODE_LEVEL03_ITEM_CD,
NODE_LEVEL03_ITEM_DESCR,
NODE_LEVEL03_SEQ_NUM_INT,
NODE_LEVEL04_ITEM_CD,
NODE_LEVEL04_ITEM_DESCR,
NODE_LEVEL04_SEQ_NUM_INT,
NODE_LEVEL05_ITEM_CD,
NODE_LEVEL05_ITEM_DESCR,
NODE_LEVEL05_SEQ_NUM_INT,
NODE_LEVEL06_ITEM_CD,
NODE_LEVEL06_ITEM_DESCR,
NODE_LEVEL06_SEQ_NUM_INT,
NODE_LEVEL07_ITEM_CD,
NODE_LEVEL07_ITEM_DESCR,
NODE_LEVEL07_SEQ_NUM_INT,
NODE_LEVEL08_ITEM_CD,
NODE_LEVEL08_ITEM_DESCR,
NODE_LEVEL08_SEQ_NUM_INT,
NODE_LEVEL09_ITEM_CD,
NODE_LEVEL09_ITEM_DESCR,
NODE_LEVEL09_SEQ_NUM_INT,
NODE_LEVEL10_ITEM_CD,
NODE_LEVEL10_ITEM_DESCR,
NODE_LEVEL10_SEQ_NUM_INT,
NODE_LEVEL11_ITEM_CD,
NODE_LEVEL11_ITEM_DESCR,
NODE_LEVEL11_SEQ_NUM_INT,
NODE_LEVEL12_ITEM_CD,
NODE_LEVEL12_ITEM_DESCR,
NODE_LEVEL12_SEQ_NUM_INT,
NODE_LEVEL13_ITEM_CD,
NODE_LEVEL13_ITEM_DESCR,
NODE_LEVEL13_SEQ_NUM_INT,
NODE_LEVEL14_ITEM_CD,
NODE_LEVEL14_ITEM_DESCR,
NODE_LEVEL14_SEQ_NUM_INT,
NODE_LEVEL15_ITEM_CD,
NODE_LEVEL15_ITEM_DESCR,
NODE_LEVEL15_SEQ_NUM_INT,
LOWEST_LEVEL
FROM
(
SELECT
COALESCE (
	NODE_LEVEL15_ITEM_CD,NODE_LEVEL14_ITEM_CD,NODE_LEVEL13_ITEM_CD,
	NODE_LEVEL12_ITEM_CD,NODE_LEVEL11_ITEM_CD,NODE_LEVEL10_ITEM_CD,
	NODE_LEVEL09_ITEM_CD,NODE_LEVEL08_ITEM_CD,NODE_LEVEL07_ITEM_CD,
	NODE_LEVEL06_ITEM_CD,NODE_LEVEL05_ITEM_CD,NODE_LEVEL04_ITEM_CD,
	NODE_LEVEL03_ITEM_CD,NODE_LEVEL02_ITEM_CD,NODE_LEVEL01_ITEM_CD )  DD_FINANCE_REPORT_LINE_ITEM_CD
,LEVEL1.BK_FINANCE_REPORT_LINE_ITEM_CD 	AS NODE_LEVEL01_ITEM_CD
,LEVEL1.FINANCE_REPORT_LINE_ITEM_DESCR  AS NODE_LEVEL01_ITEM_DESCR
,LEVEL2.BK_FINANCE_REPORT_LINE_ITEM_CD 	AS NODE_LEVEL02_ITEM_CD
,LEVEL2.FINANCE_REPORT_LINE_ITEM_DESCR  AS NODE_LEVEL02_ITEM_DESCR
,LEVEL3.BK_FINANCE_REPORT_LINE_ITEM_CD 	AS NODE_LEVEL03_ITEM_CD
,LEVEL3.FINANCE_REPORT_LINE_ITEM_DESCR  AS NODE_LEVEL03_ITEM_DESCR
,LEVEL4.BK_FINANCE_REPORT_LINE_ITEM_CD 	AS NODE_LEVEL04_ITEM_CD
,LEVEL4.FINANCE_REPORT_LINE_ITEM_DESCR  AS NODE_LEVEL04_ITEM_DESCR
,LEVEL5.BK_FINANCE_REPORT_LINE_ITEM_CD 	AS NODE_LEVEL05_ITEM_CD
,LEVEL5.FINANCE_REPORT_LINE_ITEM_DESCR  AS NODE_LEVEL05_ITEM_DESCR
,LEVEL6.BK_FINANCE_REPORT_LINE_ITEM_CD 	AS NODE_LEVEL06_ITEM_CD
,LEVEL6.FINANCE_REPORT_LINE_ITEM_DESCR  AS NODE_LEVEL06_ITEM_DESCR
,LEVEL7.BK_FINANCE_REPORT_LINE_ITEM_CD 	AS NODE_LEVEL07_ITEM_CD
,LEVEL7.FINANCE_REPORT_LINE_ITEM_DESCR  AS NODE_LEVEL07_ITEM_DESCR
,LEVEL8.BK_FINANCE_REPORT_LINE_ITEM_CD 	AS NODE_LEVEL08_ITEM_CD
,LEVEL8.FINANCE_REPORT_LINE_ITEM_DESCR  AS NODE_LEVEL08_ITEM_DESCR
,LEVEL9.BK_FINANCE_REPORT_LINE_ITEM_CD 	AS NODE_LEVEL09_ITEM_CD
,LEVEL9.FINANCE_REPORT_LINE_ITEM_DESCR  AS NODE_LEVEL09_ITEM_DESCR
,LEVEL10.BK_FINANCE_REPORT_LINE_ITEM_CD 	AS NODE_LEVEL10_ITEM_CD
,LEVEL10.FINANCE_REPORT_LINE_ITEM_DESCR  AS NODE_LEVEL10_ITEM_DESCR
,LEVEL11.BK_FINANCE_REPORT_LINE_ITEM_CD 	AS NODE_LEVEL11_ITEM_CD
,LEVEL11.FINANCE_REPORT_LINE_ITEM_DESCR  AS NODE_LEVEL11_ITEM_DESCR
,LEVEL12.BK_FINANCE_REPORT_LINE_ITEM_CD 	AS NODE_LEVEL12_ITEM_CD
,LEVEL12.FINANCE_REPORT_LINE_ITEM_DESCR  AS NODE_LEVEL12_ITEM_DESCR
,LEVEL13.BK_FINANCE_REPORT_LINE_ITEM_CD 	AS NODE_LEVEL13_ITEM_CD
,LEVEL13.FINANCE_REPORT_LINE_ITEM_DESCR  AS NODE_LEVEL13_ITEM_DESCR
,LEVEL14.BK_FINANCE_REPORT_LINE_ITEM_CD 	AS NODE_LEVEL14_ITEM_CD
,LEVEL14.FINANCE_REPORT_LINE_ITEM_DESCR  AS NODE_LEVEL14_ITEM_DESCR
,LEVEL15.BK_FINANCE_REPORT_LINE_ITEM_CD 	AS NODE_LEVEL15_ITEM_CD
,LEVEL15.FINANCE_REPORT_LINE_ITEM_DESCR  AS NODE_LEVEL15_ITEM_DESCR
,case when NODE_LEVEL15_ITEM_CD is not null then 15
	  when NODE_LEVEL14_ITEM_CD is not null then 14
	  when NODE_LEVEL13_ITEM_CD is not null then 13
	  when NODE_LEVEL12_ITEM_CD is not null then 12
	  when NODE_LEVEL11_ITEM_CD is not null then 11
	  when NODE_LEVEL10_ITEM_CD is not null then 10
	  when NODE_LEVEL09_ITEM_CD is not null then 9
	  when NODE_LEVEL08_ITEM_CD is not null then 8
	  when NODE_LEVEL07_ITEM_CD is not null then 7
	  when NODE_LEVEL06_ITEM_CD is not null then 6
	  when NODE_LEVEL05_ITEM_CD is not null then 5
	  when NODE_LEVEL04_ITEM_CD is not null then 4
	  when NODE_LEVEL03_ITEM_CD is not null then 3
	  when NODE_LEVEL02_ITEM_CD is not null then 2
	  when NODE_LEVEL01_ITEM_CD is not null then 1
end as LOWEST_LEVEL
,LEVEL1.RLI_REPORTING_SEQUENCE_NUM_INT   AS NODE_LEVEL01_SEQ_NUM_INT
,LEVEL2.RLI_REPORTING_SEQUENCE_NUM_INT  AS NODE_LEVEL02_SEQ_NUM_INT
,LEVEL3.RLI_REPORTING_SEQUENCE_NUM_INT  AS NODE_LEVEL03_SEQ_NUM_INT
,LEVEL4.RLI_REPORTING_SEQUENCE_NUM_INT  AS NODE_LEVEL04_SEQ_NUM_INT
,LEVEL5.RLI_REPORTING_SEQUENCE_NUM_INT  AS NODE_LEVEL05_SEQ_NUM_INT
,LEVEL6.RLI_REPORTING_SEQUENCE_NUM_INT  AS NODE_LEVEL06_SEQ_NUM_INT
,LEVEL7.RLI_REPORTING_SEQUENCE_NUM_INT  AS NODE_LEVEL07_SEQ_NUM_INT
,LEVEL8.RLI_REPORTING_SEQUENCE_NUM_INT  AS NODE_LEVEL08_SEQ_NUM_INT
,LEVEL9.RLI_REPORTING_SEQUENCE_NUM_INT  AS NODE_LEVEL09_SEQ_NUM_INT
,LEVEL10.RLI_REPORTING_SEQUENCE_NUM_INT  AS NODE_LEVEL10_SEQ_NUM_INT
,LEVEL11.RLI_REPORTING_SEQUENCE_NUM_INT  AS NODE_LEVEL11_SEQ_NUM_INT
,LEVEL12.RLI_REPORTING_SEQUENCE_NUM_INT  AS NODE_LEVEL12_SEQ_NUM_INT
,LEVEL13.RLI_REPORTING_SEQUENCE_NUM_INT  AS NODE_LEVEL13_SEQ_NUM_INT
,LEVEL14.RLI_REPORTING_SEQUENCE_NUM_INT  AS NODE_LEVEL14_SEQ_NUM_INT
,LEVEL15.RLI_REPORTING_SEQUENCE_NUM_INT  AS NODE_LEVEL15_SEQ_NUM_INT
    from
		(select * from $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FIN_REPORT_LINE_ITEM_NODE Where  DV_LEVEL_NUM_INT =1 ) level1
		left outer join 
		(select * from $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FIN_REPORT_LINE_ITEM_NODE Where  DV_LEVEL_NUM_INT =2 ) level2
		on level1.BK_FINANCE_REPORT_LINE_ITEM_CD = level2.RU_PRNT_FIN_REPORT_LN_ITEM_CD
		left outer join 
		(select * from $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FIN_REPORT_LINE_ITEM_NODE Where  DV_LEVEL_NUM_INT =3 ) level3
		on level2.BK_FINANCE_REPORT_LINE_ITEM_CD = level3.RU_PRNT_FIN_REPORT_LN_ITEM_CD
		left outer join 
		(select * from $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FIN_REPORT_LINE_ITEM_NODE Where  DV_LEVEL_NUM_INT =4 ) level4
		on level3.BK_FINANCE_REPORT_LINE_ITEM_CD = level4.RU_PRNT_FIN_REPORT_LN_ITEM_CD
		left outer join 
		(select * from $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FIN_REPORT_LINE_ITEM_NODE  Where  DV_LEVEL_NUM_INT =5 ) level5
		on level4.BK_FINANCE_REPORT_LINE_ITEM_CD = level5.RU_PRNT_FIN_REPORT_LN_ITEM_CD
		left outer join 
		(select * from $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FIN_REPORT_LINE_ITEM_NODE Where  DV_LEVEL_NUM_INT =6 ) level6
		on level5.BK_FINANCE_REPORT_LINE_ITEM_CD = level6.RU_PRNT_FIN_REPORT_LN_ITEM_CD
		left outer join 
		(select * from $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FIN_REPORT_LINE_ITEM_NODE Where  DV_LEVEL_NUM_INT =7 ) level7
		on level6.BK_FINANCE_REPORT_LINE_ITEM_CD = level7.RU_PRNT_FIN_REPORT_LN_ITEM_CD
		left outer join 
		(select * from $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FIN_REPORT_LINE_ITEM_NODE Where  DV_LEVEL_NUM_INT =8 ) level8
		on level7.BK_FINANCE_REPORT_LINE_ITEM_CD = level8.RU_PRNT_FIN_REPORT_LN_ITEM_CD
		left outer join 
		(select * from $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FIN_REPORT_LINE_ITEM_NODE Where  DV_LEVEL_NUM_INT =9 ) level9
		on level8.BK_FINANCE_REPORT_LINE_ITEM_CD = level9.RU_PRNT_FIN_REPORT_LN_ITEM_CD
		left outer join 
		(select * from $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FIN_REPORT_LINE_ITEM_NODE Where  DV_LEVEL_NUM_INT =10 ) level10
		on level9.BK_FINANCE_REPORT_LINE_ITEM_CD = level10.RU_PRNT_FIN_REPORT_LN_ITEM_CD
		left outer join 
		(select * from $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FIN_REPORT_LINE_ITEM_NODE Where  DV_LEVEL_NUM_INT =11 ) level11
		on level10.BK_FINANCE_REPORT_LINE_ITEM_CD = level11.RU_PRNT_FIN_REPORT_LN_ITEM_CD
		left outer join 
		(select * from $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FIN_REPORT_LINE_ITEM_NODE Where  DV_LEVEL_NUM_INT =12 ) level12
		on level11.BK_FINANCE_REPORT_LINE_ITEM_CD = level12.RU_PRNT_FIN_REPORT_LN_ITEM_CD
		left outer join 
		(select * from $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FIN_REPORT_LINE_ITEM_NODE Where  DV_LEVEL_NUM_INT =13 ) level13
		on level12.BK_FINANCE_REPORT_LINE_ITEM_CD = level13.RU_PRNT_FIN_REPORT_LN_ITEM_CD
		left outer join 
		(select * from $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FIN_REPORT_LINE_ITEM_NODE Where  DV_LEVEL_NUM_INT =14 ) level14
		on level13.BK_FINANCE_REPORT_LINE_ITEM_CD = level14.RU_PRNT_FIN_REPORT_LN_ITEM_CD
		left outer join 
		(select * from $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FIN_REPORT_LINE_ITEM_NODE Where  DV_LEVEL_NUM_INT =15) level15
		on level14.BK_FINANCE_REPORT_LINE_ITEM_CD = level15.RU_PRNT_FIN_REPORT_LN_ITEM_CD

		) A
		where not exists 
 (select 1 from  $$FINLGLVWDB.MT_FIN_RLI_HIERARCHY MGH
         WHERE   MGH.BK_FINANCE_REPORT_LINE_ITEM_CD = A.DD_FINANCE_REPORT_LINE_ITEM_CD
  )
